title: Index create error
description:
Hi:
An error occurs when I use the following command to create an index and then import data
command:
CREATE BITMAP INDEX RDF_QUAD_OGSP on DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD (O, G, S, P) PARTITION (O VARCHAR (-1, 0hexffff));

error:
Error executing a server init statement : 37000: SQ156: Internal Optimized compiler error : sqlo table has no index in sqldf.c:3782.
Please report the statement compiled. --  DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD_FT_UPGRADE ()

03:01:04 Error executing a server init statement : 37000: SQ156: Internal Optimized compiler error : sqlo table has no index in sqldf.c:3782.
Please report the statement compiled. --  WS.WS.SYS_DAV_INIT_RDF ()

I'm not sure if the index was created correctly or if the parameters were correct.
My virtuoso.ini configuration remains the default, except for the following two configurations:
NumberOfBuffers          = 5450000
MaxDirtyBuffers          = 4000000
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE DB_DBA_RDF_QUAD (O VARCHAR(255), G VARCHAR(255), S VARCHAR(255), P VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY (O, G));
INSERT INTO DB_DBA_RDF_QUAD (O, G, S, P) VALUES ('obj1', 'graph1', 'subj1', 'pred1');
CREATE INDEX RDF_QUAD_OGSP ON DB_DBA_RDF_QUAD (O, G, S, P);
SELECT * FROM DB_DBA_RDF_QUAD WHERE O IS NULL;
UPDATE DB_DBA_RDF_QUAD SET G = 'graph2' WHERE O = 'obj1' AND G IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Error creating bitmap index on RDF_QUAD table
